subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest the Festival days, the manifestation of Thy unique Name and the dawning-place of Thy glorious Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری ایام العید مظهر اسمک الفرید و مطلع کتابک المجید فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
